text:
Once upon a time in a small village filled with peculiar flowers that sang birdsong, there lived a timid canary named Polly. She loved exploring the field behind the cottage where she nestled snugly.

One day, an enchanting melody emerged from a strange flower bed. The flowers sang a song unlike any other voice.

"Who loves songs?" the flowers asked together.

"A bird!" Polly chirped.

"Then sing!

"Tweet, tweet!"

The flowers sang back songs of adventure throughout the fields. Every evening, Polly joined them for tales.

One evening, a fox sang about a treasure hidden deep within an ancient cave. Polly's song about singing a tune to unlock the treasure was so sweet that the stories became reality.

Every evening, Polly flew into the cave to meet the fox. Together, they chased rabbits into hidden caves that sang about secret gold.

Every night Polly flew home singing about her adventures.
